title: selaginella lineariformis
intro: Selaginella lineariformis, also known as the linear-leaved spike moss, is a species of fern-like plant that belongs to the Selaginella genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Its leaves and stems contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which provide various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella lineariformis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
